name: Mire
description: A relic from the Great Plague, the Mire Infested Sword is a brutal weapon. It not only cuts into the enemy, it infects the wounds of its victim with a toxic nerve poison. Deals <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage on Ground Slam attacks.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A relic from the Great Plague, the Mire Infested Sword is a brutal weapon. It not only cuts into the enemy, it infects the wounds of its victim with a toxic nerve poison. Deals <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage on Ground Slam attacks.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neural Sensors
components.description:
Implanted neural-link for controlling augmentations. Grineer design.

Location: Jupiter

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Mire appearing in the Foundry hologram while Nezha Prime is being built.
Fixed Mire hologram appearing when crafting Octavia Prime in the Foundry.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mire melee input becoming unresponsive.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed constructing Xaku in the Foundry resulting in the hologram for the Mire appearing, rather than Xaku's helmet.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Sapcaddy Bait to the intended Mirewinder Bait. Broad-Spectrum Bait is your desired Sapcaddy cocktail.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sheev, Mire, and Hate having unintentionally reduced Attack Speeds.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where the Dark Split Sword would show a Mire when being built in the Foundry.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Cronus, Dakra Prime, Dark Sword, Ether Sword, Heat Sword, Jaw Sword, Mire, Pangolin, Ether Reaper, Hate, Reaper Prime, and Plasma Sword can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Mire: Toxic Blight: adds 25% extra poison damage

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Damage 2.0 effects hooked up to the Mire.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mire not dealing poison damage on its own.
